item.title: Protecting our Environment - Sen. Marko Liias
item.description: News article "Protecting our Environment - Sen. Marko Liias" from Senate Democrats.

item.title: First Reading.
item.description: First Reading.

item.title: Held at the Desk.
item.description: Held at the Desk.

item.title: 👎💵Matt Doumit - Washington Forest Protection Association
item.description: Matt Doumit signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington Forest Protection Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Natalie Manitius - Clean Air Task Force
item.description: Natalie Manitius signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Clean Air Task Force.

item.title: ❓💵John Rothlin - Avista Corp
item.description: John Rothlin signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Avista Corp. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Kelly Jiang - Clean Air Task Force
item.description: Kelly Jiang signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍John Kydd - Faith Action Network, Third Act
item.description: John Kydd signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Faith Action Network, Third Act.

item.title: 👎Sue Lani Madsen - Washington Rural Environmental Network
item.description: Sue Lani Madsen signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington Rural Environmental Network.

item.title: On motion, referred to Ways & Means.
item.description: On motion, referred to Ways & Means.

item.title: 👍Casey MacLean - Renewable Northwest
item.description: Casey MacLean signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Renewable Northwest.

item.title: 👍💵Spencer Gray - Northwest & Intermountain Power Producers Coalition (NIPPC)
item.description: Spencer Gray signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Northwest & Intermountain Power Producers Coalition (NIPPC). They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓💵Peter Godlewski - Association of Washington Business
item.description: Peter Godlewski signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Business. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Council Jeremy Takala - Confederated Tribes and Bands of the Yakama Nation
item.description: Council Jeremy Takala signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Confederated Tribes and Bands of the Yakama Nation.

item.title: 👍💵Jason Hudson - IBEW Local 77
item.description: Jason Hudson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent IBEW Local 77. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: Minority; do not pass.
item.description: Minority; do not pass.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.
